'''鈭歽-z-z-p''' ('''kayazzepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:foolproof|foolproof]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-z-z-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foolproof|foolproof]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-z-z-p
|-
! Lemma
| kayazzepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyazepoko|thiyazepoko]] || [[word:jiyazepoko|jiyazepoko]] || [[word:shiyazepoko|shiyazepoko]] || [[word:kiyazepoko|kiyazepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyazepoko|thuthuyazepoko]] || [[word:jujuyazepoko|jujuyazepoko]] || [[word:shushuyazepoko|shushuyazepoko]] || [[word:kukuyazepoko|kukuyazepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyazepoko|thuyazepoko]] || [[word:juyazepoko|juyazepoko]] || [[word:shuyazepoko|shuyazepoko]] || [[word:kuyazepoko|kuyazepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyazepoko|thuyazepoko]] || [[word:juyazepoko|juyazepoko]] || [[word:shuyazepoko|shuyazepoko]] || [[word:kuyazepoko|kuyazepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyazepoko|theyazepoko]] || [[word:jeyazepoko|jeyazepoko]] || [[word:sheyazepoko|sheyazepoko]] || [[word:keyazepoko|keyazepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyazepoko|thothoyazepoko]] || [[word:jojoyazepoko|jojoyazepoko]] || [[word:shoshoyazepoko|shoshoyazepoko]] || [[word:kokoyazepoko|kokoyazepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyazepoko|thoyazepoko]] || [[word:joyazepoko|joyazepoko]] || [[word:shoyazepoko|shoyazepoko]] || [[word:koyazepoko|koyazepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyazepoko|thoyazepoko]] || [[word:joyazepoko|joyazepoko]] || [[word:shoyazepoko|shoyazepoko]] || [[word:koyazepoko|koyazepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙yazepoko|th忙yazepoko]] || [[word:j忙yazepoko|j忙yazepoko]] || [[word:sh忙yazepoko|sh忙yazepoko]] || [[word:k忙yazepoko|k忙yazepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayazepoko|thathayazepoko]] || [[word:jajayazepoko|jajayazepoko]] || [[word:shashayazepoko|shashayazepoko]] || [[word:kakayazepoko|kakayazepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayazepoko|thayazepoko]] || [[word:jayazepoko|jayazepoko]] || [[word:shayazepoko|shayazepoko]] || [[word:kayazepoko|kayazepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayazepoko|thayazepoko]] || [[word:jayazepoko|jayazepoko]] || [[word:shayazepoko|shayazepoko]] || [[word:kayazepoko|kayazepoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
